svg.title: A Nicolosi globular (two circle) projection map of the Earth, showing the course of the Spray around the world between April 24, 1895, and July 3, 1898. The laft half shows the Western Hemisphere, including North and South America and the majority of the Pacific Ocean. The right half is centered just south of India and shows Asia, Africa, and Australia. The map shows the full path of the Spray, starting in New England, then across the Atlantic to Gibraltar, back across the Atlantic to South America, around Cape Horn, across the South Pacific to Australia, then westward to South Africa, around the Cape of Good Hope, across the Atlantic to the tip of Brazil, and then north back to New England and home.
